task: Using only the provided embedded geospatial packet, produce a terrain suitability model and deliver: 1) route_suitability_grid.csv and 2) route_memo.md. Apply the explicit rules: exclude any cell with flood_depth > 1.0 m or slope > 10%. Score cells so that smaller distance_to_road yields a better (lower) score. Do not invent additional records; if an input value is missing for a required field, mark that record as needs_review. Include all intermediate calculations, assumptions, exceptions, uncertainty/sensitivity notes, and validation checks. Provide an explicit final decision table that ties every recommendation back to the exact supplied row and value. The response must be executable from the embedded packet alone (no external data lookup beyond conceptual understanding of public-source methodology).
